about.privacy_first_description: 无跟踪、无画像、无过滤气泡。你的搜索保持私密。
about.multiple_sources_description: 聚合 DuckDuckGo、Brave、Wikipedia 等来源的结果。
about.instant_answers_description: 快速获取计算、转换、定义等答案。
about.direct_answers_description: 提供 49+ 个用于 IP、DNS、WHOIS、编码和开发者工具的操作符。
about.tor_support_description: 通过 Tor 隐藏服务访问以获得最大匿名性。
about.responsive_design_description: 可在桌面、平板和移动设备上运行。
about.no_javascript_description: 核心功能在未启用 JavaScript 时也能工作。
about.api_docs_description: 该应用提供带交互式文档的 REST 和 GraphQL API。
about.open_source_description: 这个搜索引擎是免费的开源软件。你可以托管自己的实例，并完全控制自己的搜索体验。

alerts.create_subtitle: 当有新结果匹配此搜索时接收通知。
alerts.engine_filters_help: 全部不勾选即可监控所有已启用的引擎。

alerts.check_email_confirm: 请检查邮箱以确认并激活此提醒。
alerts.confirmed_subtitle: 你的搜索提醒现已激活。
alerts.manage_subtitle: 更新投递渠道、频率，或暂停此提醒。

alerts.error_delivery_channel_required: 请至少选择一个投递渠道。

alerts.error_webhook_required: 启用 webhook 投递时需要提供 webhook URL。
alerts.error_unknown_engine: 一个或多个所选引擎不可用。

cookie_consent.default_message: 我们使用 Cookie 来提升你的浏览体验。继续使用本站即表示你同意我们使用 Cookie。

contact.title: 联系我们
contact.description: 有问题、反馈或需要帮助？请使用下面的表单给我们发送消息。
contact.success_default: 感谢您的消息。我们会尽快回复。

privacy.data_collection_description: %s 的设计将隐私作为核心原则。我们仅收集服务正常运行所严格必需的数据。
privacy.search_queries_description: 您的搜索查询会发送到上游搜索引擎，但不会存储在我们的服务器上。
privacy.ip_addresses_description: 我们不会记录 IP 地址，也不会将其用于跟踪。
privacy.cookies_description: 我们只使用用于会话管理和用户偏好设置（如主题设置）的必要 Cookie。
privacy.data_usage_description: 任何临时处理的数据仅用于：
privacy.data_usage_item_forward: 将您的搜索查询转发给上游搜索引擎
privacy.data_usage_item_preferences: 记住您的偏好（主题、语言）
privacy.data_retention_description: 我们不会保留搜索查询或个人数据。会话数据是临时的，在您关闭浏览器或会话过期时会被删除。
privacy.third_parties_description: 您的搜索查询会转发给上游搜索引擎以获取结果。我们不会与第三方共享任何其他数据。
privacy.third_parties_followup: 每个上游搜索引擎都有自己的隐私政策。如果您有疑虑，建议查看这些政策。
privacy.cookies_intro: 我们只使用必要的 Cookie：
privacy.session_cookie_description: 用于保持您的会话（如果已登录）
privacy.preference_cookie_description: 在 Cookie 同意允许时，记住您的主题和语言偏好
privacy.cookies_followup: 我们不使用跟踪 Cookie、分析 Cookie 或广告 Cookie。
privacy.your_rights_description: 由于我们不存储个人数据，因此没有可供访问、修改或删除的数据。您的隐私从设计上就得到了保护。
privacy.contact_prefix: 如果您对我们的隐私做法有任何问题，请

terms.acceptance_description: 访问或使用 %s ("the Service") 即表示您同意受本服务条款约束。如果您不同意这些条款，请不要使用 Service。
terms.description_body: %s 是一款注重隐私的元搜索引擎，汇总来自多个搜索引擎的结果。Service 以 "as is" 形式提供，不提供任何类型的担保。
terms.user_conduct_item_unlawful: 将 Service 用于任何非法目的
terms.user_conduct_item_access: 尝试未经授权访问 Service 或其系统
terms.user_conduct_item_automated: 以超出合理使用范围的方式使用自动化手段访问 Service
terms.user_conduct_item_reverse_engineering: 尝试对 Service 进行逆向工程、反编译或提取源代码
terms.privacy_prefix: 您对 Service 的使用也受我们的
terms.privacy_suffix: 约束。我们致力于保护您的隐私并尽量减少数据收集。
terms.intellectual_property_description: Service 及其原创内容、功能和特性归 %s 的运营者所有，并受适用知识产权法保护。
terms.intellectual_property_followup: 显示的搜索结果归各自所有者所有，并受其各自条款和条件约束。
terms.third_party_content_description: Service 汇总来自第三方搜索引擎的结果。我们不控制也不认可这些搜索引擎返回的内容。您使用第三方内容需自行承担风险。
terms.disclaimer_intro: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED. WE DO NOT WARRANT THAT:
terms.disclaimer_item_uninterrupted: Service 将不间断或无错误地运行
terms.disclaimer_item_accurate: 搜索结果将准确、完整或最新
terms.disclaimer_item_defects: 任何缺陷都会得到修正
terms.limitation_description: IN NO EVENT SHALL THE OPERATORS OF %s BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARISING OUT OF OR RELATED TO YOUR USE OF THE SERVICE.
terms.modifications_description: 我们保留随时修改、暂停或终止 Service 的权利，恕不另行通知。对于任何修改、暂停或终止，我们不对您或任何第三方承担责任。
terms.changes_description: 我们可能会不时更新本服务条款。我们会通过更新 "Last updated" 日期来通知用户任何重大变更。您在变更后继续使用 Service 即表示接受新条款。
terms.contact_prefix: 如果您对本服务条款有任何问题，请

help.title: Help & Documentation
help.subtitle: Learn how to get the most out of %s

getting_started.heading: Getting Started
getting_started.intro_prefix: %s is a privacy-respecting metasearch engine. Simply type your query in the search box and press
getting_started.no_tracking: Unlike traditional search engines, we don't track you, store your search history, or create a profile about you.

categories.heading: Search Categories
categories.intro: Use the category tabs to narrow the engines and result types used for your search.

music.label: Music
music.description: Songs, artists, albums, and music videos

operators.heading: Search Operators
operators.intro: Refine your searches with these operators:
operators.intext: Find word in page body text
operators.related: Sites similar to a given URL
operators.cache: Cached or archived copies of a URL

shortcuts.heading: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.intro: Keyboard shortcuts work best on search and results pages. They never replace normal navigation, so everything still works without JavaScript.
shortcuts.open_tab_or_new: Open the selected result in the current tab or a new tab
shortcuts.prev_next_page: Go to the previous or next page of results
shortcuts.first_last: Jump to the first or last result

privacy.heading: Privacy Features
privacy.no_tracking_text: We don't track your searches or create user profiles
privacy.no_history_text: Your searches are not stored on our servers
privacy.sanitized_links_text: Common tracking parameters are stripped from result URLs before they are shown
privacy.tor_support_prefix: Access via Tor hidden service for maximum anonymity
privacy.minimal_cookies_text: Only essential cookies for preferences (no analytics)
privacy.open_source_text: Full source code available for audit

tor.heading: Tor Access
tor.intro: This application is available as a Tor hidden service for enhanced privacy.
tor.pending_note: Tor address will be available once the hidden service connects to the Tor network.
tor.step_open: Open Tor Browser and wait for it to connect
tor.step_paste: Copy the onion address above and paste it into the Tor Browser address bar
tor.footer_note: Using Tor provides additional privacy by hiding your IP address and encrypting your connection through the Tor network.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q_results_diff: Why are results different from Google?
faq.a_results_diff: We aggregate results from multiple sources without personalization. Results aren't filtered based on your history, location, or profile, so they may differ from what you see on personalized search engines.
faq.q_tor_access_summary: How do I access via Tor?
faq.a_tor_access_see_section: See the Tor Access section above for the address and instructions.
faq.a_self_host_prefix: Yes! This is free and open source software.
faq.a_self_host_repo: Check our source code repository for installation instructions.
faq.q_engines: What search engines do you use?
faq.a_engines: We aggregate results from multiple engines including Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Brave, Qwant, Mojeek, Yahoo, Yandex, Baidu, Startpage, Wikipedia, arXiv, PubMed, GitHub, Hacker News, Reddit, YouTube, OpenStreetMap, and Wolfram Alpha.
faq.a_instant: Many instant answers are generated locally for calculations, formatting, conversions, parsing, and text tools. Some lookups query remote sources or your configured search backends when that is required for the feature.

need_more.heading: Need More Help?
need_more.text_prefix: If you have questions or need assistance, please

api.heading: API Documentation
api.intro: This application exposes REST endpoints, direct-answer APIs, GraphQL, and an OpenAPI description for integrations and automation.
api.openapi_desc: Interactive REST API explorer with try-it-out functionality
api.graphql_desc: Interactive GraphQL explorer with schema documentation
api.ep_related: Related search suggestions for a query
api.ep_openapi: OpenAPI UI and raw OpenAPI specification

bangs.heading: Bang Commands
bangs.intro_prefix: Bang commands send your search directly to another site. Use either
bangs.intro_suffix: . Built-in bangs are available, and server or user-defined bangs can be added on top.
bangs.ex_ddg_desc: Send the query to DuckDuckGo from the end of the search

direct.heading: Instant & Direct Answers
direct.intro_da_text_suffix: format and open as full-page results.
direct.intro_ia_text: are triggered from the regular search box and can also be accessed over the API.

dev.heading: Developer Tools
dev.yaml: Format YAML or convert JSON and YAML

text.heading: Text Tools
text.lorem: Lorem ipsum text (paragraphs, words, or sentences)

cache.heading: Cache & Archive
cache.rotl: Rules of the Internet direct answer
